hook: One clean message can be mature; repeated checking usually is not.
body: A brief follow-up protects your dignity better than either instant withdrawal or anxious pursuit.

hook: Some men keep reopening the thread because they want relief from uncertainty more than they want a real answer.
body: You do not need endless tries to prove sincerity; one direct attempt is enough.

hook: You do not need endless tries to prove sincerity; one direct attempt is enough.
body: A short note confirming interest and asking once is clean. Three more messages after silence is usually self-punishment.

hook: A short note confirming interest and asking once is clean. Three more messages after silence is usually self-punishment.
body: If you want clarity, send one measured follow-up and let the next move belong to them.
